LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.Enable.Desc: When enabled, colonists will generate dialogues and monologues based on game events and their state.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.ChitchatInterc: Replace vanilla Chitchat/DeepTalk interactions with AI-generated dialogue.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.HediffReaction: When a colonist is injured or falls ill, AI generates a dialogue reaction.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.LevelUpReactio: When a colonist levels up a skill, AI generates a dialogue reaction.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.ThoughtReactio: When a colonist's mood changes significantly, AI generates a dialogue reaction.
When a colonist is idle, automatically trigger an inner monologue. Monologues enter context just like dialogues.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.AutoMonologueD: When a colonist is idle, automatically trigger an inner monologue. Monologues enter context just like dialogues.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.PlayerDialogue: Show a chat button on colonists and a right-click dialogue option, allowing the player to initiate conversations.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.MonologueCoold: Minimum interval between same-type monologues for the same colonist. Increase to reduce repetitive monologues.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.MoodThreshold: Mood change threshold: {0} (triggers when |moodEffect| ≥ this value)
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.MaxDailyDialog: Max daily dialogue rounds per pair: {0}
Maximum dialogue rounds per colonist pair per day. Higher values produce more dialogues but increase API costs.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.EnableDialogue: Automatically generate a reply when receiving dialogue, creating two-way conversations.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.StartDelay.Des: No dialogue is triggered for a period after loading a save or starting a new game, avoiding excessive requests at startup.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.ShowNotificati: Show notification when Thought is injected
Display a notification on screen when the dialogue system injects a mood Thought into a colonist.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.ShowOverlay.De: Display a floating panel on screen showing recent dialogue content.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.OverlayOpacity: Opacity of the dialogue overlay. 1.0 is fully opaque, 0.1 is nearly transparent.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.OverlayMaxMess: Maximum number of dialogue lines shown simultaneously in the overlay. Older messages are hidden when exceeded.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.Overlay.Title: RimMind Dialogue
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.Log.Title: Dialogue Log
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.Log.SelectTab: Select a tab to view dialogue
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.FloatMenu.NotReady: Dialogue system not ready, please try again later
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.FloatMenu.Pending: Dialogue request in progress, please wait
You are roleplaying as a RimWorld colonist. Generate natural dialogue or monologue based on your current state.
Respond in first person based on your current state.
Speak a dialogue line with {0} in first person (15~40 characters).
Speak an inner monologue in first person (15~40 characters).
1. Perceive current state (mood, health, environment) 2. Consider the trigger reason 3. Generate dialogue/monologue matching character personality 4. Evaluate emotional impact of dialogue
Maintain character consistency; do not break the fourth wall; dialogue 15~40 chars, monologue 15~40 chars
Return only the following JSON format: {"reply":"dialogue/monologue text","thought":{"tag":"ENCOURAGED|HURT|VALUED|CONNECTED|STRESSED|IRRITATED|NONE","description":"≤15 chars"},"relation_delta":0}
If unable to generate, return {"reply":"...","thought":{"tag":"NONE","description":"No special emotion"}}.

You can use the relation_delta field to change the relationship between dialogue participants. Range -5 to +5, positive increases affinity, negative decreases it. Decide based on dialogue content and current relationship: friendly conversation may add +1~+3, arguments may deduct -2~-5. Do not include this field if the dialogue content does not involve relationship changes.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.PlayerTaskInstru: You are roleplaying as RimWorld colonist {0}.
Based on your current state and personality, naturally respond to the player's dialogue in first person.

1. Review your current state (mood, health, what you are doing) 2. Consider relationship with the player and past conversations 3. Generate a reply matching your character personality 4. Evaluate emotional impact of the conversation
Maintain character consistency, do not deviate from current state; reply length 20~60 characters; do not break the fourth wall; do not mention game mechanics

Input: Player says "Are you okay? You look tired today." Output: {"reply":"Yeah... a bit tired, been mining all night. But thanks for your concern.","thought":{"tag":"VALUED","description":"Feels warm being cared for"}}
Return only the following JSON format, nothing else: {"reply":"dialogue text","thought":{"tag":"ENCOURAGED|HURT|VALUED|CONNECTED|STRESSED|IRRITATED|NONE","description":"≤15 chars"}}
If unable to generate dialogue, return {"reply":"...","thought":{"tag":"NONE","description":"No special emotion"}}.
[Initiator] You are speaking with {0}. Respond based on your relationship with them and their current state.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.Role.Prisoner: Role constraint: This person is a prisoner. Tone should be wary, hesitant, mentioning imprisonment, possibly begging or bargaining.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.Role.Slave: Role constraint: This person is a slave. Tone should be fearful, submissive, mentioning forced labor and exhaustion, referring to colonists as "master".
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.Role.Enemy: Role constraint: This person is an enemy. Tone should be hostile, aggressive, using short commands or threats.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.Role.Visitor: Role constraint: This person is a visitor. Tone should be polite, curious, respectful, treating fellow visitors as companions.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.AutoTrigger: Based on your current state and surroundings, respond naturally.
